series_metadata.series_description: ﻿The EBS strategic plan documents the goals and direction in which the office is moving and the benchmarks being utilized to make that happen, which are in conjunction with the overall plan and goals of the department. The plan also provides a history of how it evolved overtime in terms of the direction the department is moving.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: ﻿Retain 60 days after hardcopy is prepped, scanned (imaged), and quality control is complete then destroyed. ; Electronic: ﻿Retain in office 5 years, then destroy when no longer of administrative value., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
